---
title: Mapping Celestia's Boarding
---

*"The school room has been very uncomfortable and I was very glad when the last lesson was heard and I ready to come to my boarding place I thought certainly it would rain, sat up some time wanting for it to rain then retired feeling that the goodness of God was about my pathway."*

**Celestia Webster's Diary - July 17, 1866**

```{r}
library(sf)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(USAboundaries)
library(tidyverse)

"Geocode locations"
locations <- geo(c("Conesus"))
locations

"Convert locations to sf object"
locations_sf <- st_as_sf(locations, coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326)
locations_sf

"Get a Base Map"
newyork <- us_counties(states = "New York")

"Reproject the data"
# Find EPSG code for New York
state_plane(state = "NY")

# Project
newyork_proj <- st_transform(newyork, "EPSG:32116")

# Map the data
ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = newyork_proj) + 
  labs(title = "Map of New York counties",
       subtitle = "Conesus, Livingston County, New York") + 
  theme_minimal()
```
